records.m_Talk_ENG: Now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nooooo! I don't want to go out like this!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Nooooo! I don't want to go out like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on? Was Mickey's Gran Turismo this strong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on? Was Mickey's Gran Turismo this strong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on? Was Mickey's Gran Turismo this strong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Is it an Awakening Collapse caused by the Awakening of an Awakening?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Is it an Awakening Collapse caused by the Awakening of an Awakening?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's ridiculous. Are you idiots?

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's ridiculous. Are you idiots?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. Don't forget about me, lubbers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha. Don't forget about me, lubbers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. Don't forget about me, lubbers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hero always appears last, yarr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hero always appears last, yarr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hero always appears last, yarr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed. I am the great pirate of the century who oversees the ocean.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed. I am the great pirate of the century who oversees the ocean.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed. I am the great pirate of the century who oversees the ocean.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Barbarossa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Barbarossa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Barbarossa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yarr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yarr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yarr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. I cannot believe you are struggling with a group of fools after receiving my help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. I cannot believe you are struggling with a group of fools after receiving my help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. I cannot believe you are struggling with a group of fools after receiving my help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rise, you lubbers! We will triumph with my arrival!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rise, you lubbers! We will triumph with my arrival!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rise, you lubbers! We will triumph with my arrival!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, lubber? That expression looks familiar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, lubber? That expression looks familiar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, lubber? That expression looks familiar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? My body is losing its shape...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? My body is losing its shape...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? My body is losing its shape...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Barbarossa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Barbarossa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Barbarossa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah ha ha. Dumb Duck. Dummy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah ha ha. Dumb Duck. Dummy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah ha ha. Dumb Duck. Dummy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-yo! You'll never be able to escape being a loser! Maybe you should come back when you become wiser!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-yo! You'll never be able to escape being a loser! Maybe you should come back when you become wiser!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-yo! You'll never be able to escape being a loser! Maybe you should come back when you become wiser!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a just dumb duck who's nothing but a poser!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a just dumb duck who's nothing but a poser!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a just dumb duck who's nothing but a poser!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmm. However, I will never forget how you raced across the ocean with my Eternium-fused body on top!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmm. However, I will never forget how you raced across the ocean with my Eternium-fused body on top!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmm. However, I will never forget how you raced across the ocean with my Eternium-fused body on top!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa!
